sourcingNote: Hex colors confirmed from official SVG logo. Values confirmed from official NHL Guide. Pantone confirmed by logo slick.
description: The Nashville Predators are an NHL franchise based in Nashville, Tennessee, founded in 1998. They play at Bridgestone Arena and compete in the Central Division of the Western Conference. The Predators are known for their raucous home atmosphere, their development of elite defensemen, and their memorable run to the Stanley Cup Final in 2017.
